subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I bear witness to Thy power and Thy majesty and Thy sovereignty, and that Thou art God, there is none [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اشهد بقدرتک و عظمتک و اختیارک و بانک انت الله لا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @Manifestation of God as mediator, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
